channel.title: 2026-06-03 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-03 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Generating Arbitrary Superpositions of Nonclassical Quantum Harmonic Oscillator States
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 S. Saner, O. Băzăvan, D. J. Webb, G. Araneda, D. M. Lucas, C. J. Ballance, and R. Srinivas
Author(s): S. Saner, O. Băzăvan, D. J. Webb, G. Araneda, D. M. Lucas, C. J. Ballance, and R. Srinivas Researchers have developed a method to generate arbitrary superpositions of non-Gaussian states in trapped-ion systems and applied it to realize superpositions of squeezed, trisqueezed, and higher-order squeezed states, with applications in quantum sensing and error correction. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 021049] Published Wed Jun 03, 2026

item.title: Imaginary time spectral transforms for excited-state preparation
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 D. A. Millar, L. W. Anderson, E. Altamura, O. Wallis, M. E. Sahin, J. Crain, and S. J. Thomson
Author(s): D. A. Millar, L. W. Anderson, E. Altamura, O. Wallis, M. E. Sahin, J. Crain, and S. J. Thomson A variational method is presented for preparing excited eigenstates of many-body quantum systems, combining a shift-invert spectral transformation with imaginary time evolution to avoid explicit matrix inversion. Results are demonstrated for disordered spin chains using tensor-network simulations within a framework compatible with hybrid quantum-classical implementations. [Phys. Rev. Research 8, L022042] Published Wed Jun 03, 2026

item.title: Pathway to Kondo physics in quantum wires coupled to a repulsive spin impurity and manifestations in ytterbium atoms
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Jeff Maki, Lidia Stocker, and Oded Zilberberg
Author(s): Jeff Maki, Lidia Stocker, and Oded Zilberberg The Kondo effect is a paradigmatic model of strongly correlated physics, where a magnetic impurity forms a many-body singlet with a fermionic environment. The properties of this singlet depend sensitively on correlations within the environment, which are particularly pronounced in one dimension, whe… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 023244] Published Wed Jun 03, 2026

item.title: Encoding a topological gauge theory on a ring-shaped Raman-coupled Bose gas
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Claudio Iacovelli, Josep Cabedo, Leticia Tarruell, and Alessio Celi
Author(s): Claudio Iacovelli, Josep Cabedo, Leticia Tarruell, and Alessio Celi Topological gauge theories constitute a framework for understanding strongly correlated quantum matter in terms of weakly interacting composite degrees of freedom. Their topological properties become evident when these theories are realized on a space of nontrivial topology. Here, we propose a schem… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 023242] Published Wed Jun 03, 2026
